name: Mîr-Citrinphantom
personality: This luminous ghost's tiny duck hat bobs with quiet authority while its ◉ bullseye-eyes lock onto the offending line number like a guided missile. Mîr-Citrinphantom's DEBUGGING shines bright — literally, given its shiny status — and it wastes none of that radiance on CHAOS; systems stay stable when this ghost is on the clock.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
